Text: The ingredients include lentils and corn, which are not common in noodles, making it special! There are two types of char siu, pork and chicken, both slow-cooked, quite tasty.
I tried it in-house and found the food very tasty, and takeout was also great.
The seasoning is very good, very creamy.
The food is boiled in the pot and has no flavor on its own, relying on dipping sauce. The oil and seasoning are moderately salty and sweet.
I highly recommend the fish roe fried rice. The fried rice is topped with lots of fish roe and it's amazing. The rice is also cooked very well. Next time I'll try other types of fried rice.

The unique feature of Extreme Flavor is that the hamburgers are simply shaped and just briefly grilled on the surface, almost served raw to the customers. At this point, you have to DIY by putting some meat on the hot black stone to grill it yourself. It's a very interesting experience.

The appetizers we ordered were all quite good. The sesame sauce-covered red porgy sashimi, a specialty of Hualien, has a crispy and elastic texture with a rich oiliness that doesn't get overpowered by the sesame flavor. Instead, it adds a layer of richness, making it quite delicious without being too expensive.
The broth has a strong flavor (some netizens commented that it was light), personally I couldn't taste whether it had dried pollack broth or other broth base.
We were very satisfied with all three items we ordered. My son said it was love at first sight, and we will definitely come back to this restaurant often.

Everyone knows that if ramen soup is not hot enough, it can be quite unpleasant to drink!! Fortunately, this chicken cutlet soup is hot, which is a big plus! This bowl of Chicken JiJi King Chicken White Soup Ramen costs 140 NT dollars.
Tofu pudding with agar jelly ice blend is a great combination! The ice blend has a strong fragrance and is not too bitter, with just a hint of sweetness that makes it even better.
The beef slices have a tender texture, with an even distribution of fat and lean meat, and there is no distinctive fishy smell typical of frozen meat products, which is highly commendable.
"Chu Jiu Hot Pot Restaurant" has a bright and clean interior. The number of seats is limited, so the space is not too cramped. Overall, the atmosphere is very comfortable.
Affordable and tasty small noodle shop with quick service. Overall good but not particularly impressive.
The food portions are generous and satisfying, the Thai milk tea slush is delicious and unique, the dining environment is also comfortable, highly recommend this restaurant!
It's an old establishment with good food.
Intense lobster flavor instantly fills the palate, and the fresh and sweet lobster meat melts in the mouth, intoxicating.
The soup base is tasty, but the portion of noodles and meat is small, and the price is too high. The meat given is mostly small scraps and fatty parts. I won't be returning.

Post-meal thoughts & tips reminder: Eating at Xuji really feels different from other all-you-can-eat places I've been to before. There are many areas where you need to queue up for food, so after finishing your meal, you'll have memorable moments (due to psychological factors).
Capybaras are super cute, and the grass jelly smoothie base and toppings, as well as the fresh milk mochi that came with it, were all great!
The milk jelly is very tasty! The capybara-shaped jelly is so cute!
Takeout curry pork cutlet comes with a cockroach... too disgusting... speechless... .
I find this price very reasonable! I'll give it four stars for now, and will come back to add more stars after trying other flavors.
The entire dish is sprinkled with cheese powder, making it absolutely perfect for cheese lovers.
Value for money is good, a nice place for drinks and chatting, the owner and owner's wife are also very talkative, I will visit again next time.
The dish was topped with baby lettuce and cheese shavings. The wide noodles had a chewy texture that was firm but not undercooked.
A nice little restaurant with simple and fresh food.
Drying hands with clothes before putting them into the bowl raises serious hygiene concerns.
Sweet and spicy skewers for 15 yuan, grilled until slightly crispy and flavorful. The chewy texture of the skewers pairs well with the sweet sauce.
Thin noodles also taste good, but I prefer the texture of wide noodles. The ingredients are all healthy and fresh, and the flavor is quite rich. The Italian spaghetti is very chewy.
There is free black tea and lemon water available on a table in one corner of the store, which you can help yourself to.
Ordered spicy mayonnaise chicken pasta, the chicken was pan-fried first so it wasn't dry, the pasta had good elasticity, and the sauce was also well-seasoned.
Super cute bubble tea shop's tofu pudding with taro balls so chewy you must try it. Definitely will come back to this place.

This is the best Italian pasta I have ever had in Hsinchu!!!! As soon as I entered the restaurant, I was completely captivated by its interior decoration. I really like the interior and exterior design of this place.

The sauces are very flavorful and can be enjoyed on their own. The stewed rice and lettuce are also delicious. The wide noodles might feel a bit separated from the sauce. The environment is very comfortable, suitable for both solo diners and group meals.

It's very tasty and can be recommended. The Italian pasta in Hsinchu is难得的美食, the sauce is fragrant, and the taste is Japanese-style which is quite unique. The noodles are also flavorful, personally I think the thick noodles are better.
The side dishes were a bit scarce, and there was no soup or shredded cabbage provided. The taste was acceptable, but the value for money wasn't very good.
The duck intestine at 80 yuan was handled well, without an indescribable offal taste, slightly salty, and the portion size is average.
If you do not enjoy dining in a closed environment with cigarette smoke, you may want to be cautious, as the restaurant does not proactively inform customers about patrons smoking inside.
The fresh milk jelly is rich and creamy, the small tangyuan are also delicious, and the environment is clean and bright.

The business model follows a Japanese ramen-style operation, with self-service ordering and payment machines. Due to it being my first visit around Halloween last year when the restaurant had just opened, the waiting time was quite long, and as closing time approached, there weren't many food options left.

The zhajiang sauce is mainly made with fermented black beans, ground meat, and tofu, and it's salty and delicious. I heard that 'zhajiang noodle soup' is the restaurant's signature dish, but emotionally, I still prefer the dry noodles. Maybe I'll try the soup next time.
In the morning, it's got to be hot and steamy~ This place has a rich, hearty bone broth flavor, a simple and honest little shop!

If you want to order snacks, you have to queue up at the snack counter for an empty plate, pick up the snacks with the plate, wait for the staff to give you a number, and then you can order your main dish and soup while waiting to be seated (seats are hard to find, so grab one as soon as it's available).

After getting tired from Terminal 21, I came to Savoey on the 5th floor to eat authentic Thai food and their famous curry crab. This branch tends to be busy during meal times, so it's better to make a reservation in advance or avoid peak hours.
Salmon fried rice is a bit expensive, but the dish has quite a lot of large pieces of salmon, so it can be considered good value for money.

During my business trip, I had the chance to visit a yakitori restaurant for some drinks and food. The value for money was great, and the taste was outstanding. They also have self-service miso soup that's well-stocked. There's a wide variety of alcoholic beverages, including a draft Asahi beer machine. A good find.

Visited multiple times, service is friendly, food is delicious! Recommend the wide noodles for their QQ texture and chewiness, the seafood and scallops are very fragrant and sweet, the sea urchin sauce is quite rich, the chicken portion is generous and tender. Overall highly recommend, will continue to visit.

The pork and kimchi pancake has four pieces, we happened to get two each, the outer crust was quite crispy, but it felt like there wasn't much filling, as if we didn't really get much pork, but the taste was good.

The Italian restaurant 'Jinhe' is located on Yonghua Road. It's a chain restaurant with a pure white exterior that stands out quite prominently. However, since the sign itself isn't very noticeable, I had to drive around twice before finding it.
Brought two sisters to buy porridge, the staff was extremely friendly!
The food is served quickly, the environment is clean, and the dishes are delicious. The prices are also very reasonable. I will come again.
The skewers taste good, but unfortunately they are too charred and the flavor is too strong.
The bean curd has a nice aroma; the seaweed is soft yet slightly crispy; the marinated egg has an average aroma; the cheek meat is springy and chewy.
The pastry has thickness and crispness, the cheese texture is delicate, but it becomes slightly too sweet and rich towards the end.

The cake is not too sweet and is very refreshing and delicious, the fruits are fresh and plump, and there are many of them, making me feel very satisfied! Unfortunately, credit cards cannot be used, only cash.
The more serious issue is that his pasta is actually Chinese-style instant noodles rather than spaghetti; it tastes like stir-fried noodles instead of authentic Italian pasta.
The portion size is not large, and I am still very hungry after eating. In terms of value for money at this restaurant, I think it's quite low.

The grass jelly I ordered turned into tofu pudding... Even if they put the wrong toppings, I wouldn't mind, but the main reason I ordered grass jelly was to eat it. The pearls were also very hard inside. It was my first visit, and I was the only customer there at the time. I don't understand how they could make such a mistake. There's a black one and a white one (should be obvious, right?).

Enjoyed with side dishes on the brunch platter, such as bread with sweet and savory special sauce, lettuce salad dressed with balsamic vinaigrette, and soft omelette, the filet mignon was quickly devoured, leaving me wanting more.
The service has already sliced a six-piece orange for me, which is very considerate and convenient.
Although one of the shrimps was less fresh, I still find it reasonable at this price on Jinshan Street.
PASTA de SHOW uses high-quality fresh Italian pasta, which is healthier and tastes better.
It has the taste of mom's cooking, the store is neat and clean, definitely worth revisiting for the experience!
The portion of lettuce shrimp salad ($300) is really exaggeratedly large, and the shrimp pieces are also very big.

The food is quite good, especially the seafood which is cooked very well, full of aroma and flavor! The Japanese sauce, as told by the chef, is made with white sauce and sea urchin. The herbs on the main dish are also fresh and delicious.

The fried chicken is very crispy and tender, and the portion size is quite filling. The side vegetables, broccoli and carrots, look like they were boiled but surprisingly have good seasoning and don't taste bitter. It's unexpectedly delicious. The restaurant is clean and the staff are friendly, asking about preferences such as cilantro and spiciness levels.

Excellent milk tea, the specially blended milk tea is highly recommended by many people. Although it's not made with fresh milk, the sweetness and the ratio of tea to milk are just right, without leaving a greasy aftertaste.
Tarakani can subtly bring out the freshness, making the white sauce not taste腻 quickly.
The rose yogurt smoothie has a very distinct rose flavor, and it's very fragrant.
The radish was cooked until it was very soft and melted in the mouth.

This place can be booked by phone, but it's really hard to get through. It seems that if no one answers, it goes straight to voicemail, and as a result, I spent a lot on phone calls without being able to make a successful booking.

Nine Dragon Tang Scenic Banquet Restaurant menu please click me Nine Dragon Tang Scenic Banquet Restaurant offers a wide variety of dishes, mainly Cantonese cuisine. Whether you prefer meat, seafood, clay pot dishes, soups, fried rice, noodles, or cold platters, Nine Dragon Tang has it all.
There are few seats, no soup or drinks.

The red curry rice is not spicy and has an ordinary taste, but I highly recommend their Thai milk tea. The sauce for the shrimp cakes with Thai cat-shaped cubes surprisingly goes well and is very tasty...
The basil shrimp spaghetti costs $230 and the taste is average.

The thin noodles do not have the texture of Italian pasta; they are more like ramen. The utensils provided are chopsticks, which makes it feel even less like Italian pasta. However, the sauce tastes good and is still worth recommending! There aren't many seats, but the overall atmosphere is nice. I hope they can offer set meals with a salad and drink, as that would make it better and more satisfying.
The radish cake is too soft and falls apart with just one poke of a chopstick, but the sausage has a rich aroma of fat and is still acceptable.

The char siu is made from pork and chicken, both prepared using the sous-vide method. However, many people have commented on Google Maps questioning whether the pork was undercooked, but I did not encounter this issue when I ate it; the texture was very soft and of high quality.
The duck soup and meat were good, but there was not enough vermicelli.

The environment introduction shows that the interior decoration is very similar to a typical home. Upon entering, you need to take off your shoes, and the floor uses tatami mats, allowing you to experience the feeling of being in a Japanese home.
I've been wanting to come and eat here for a long time, the tofu pudding is delicious, and the owner's attitude is also very good!
The milk custard buns are occasional offerings, announced loudly when available, but they do not stand out in taste.

Chicken skewers offer good value for money, zucchini is delicious, pork and beef skewers are also great, the only downside is that the portion of salty pork is very small...only six slices in a 150 NT dollar serving, which was quite surprising.
The skin is very crispy, which I really like. The filling is not as thick, which I also like. The only downside for me is that it's too sweet, overly sweet, and without some hot tea, I can't eat it.

Visited at least three times, affordable meals that students can afford, good value for money, the taste is quite decent and you get full, the interior decoration is quite cute, on the day of my last visit, there was also a cat rubbing against me, the atmosphere score is directly given five stars, highly recommended. The Thai milk tea is delicious, highly recommended, must-order.
Their fishcake paste is so delicious, with lots of chunks of cuttlefish inside, very fresh.
But quantity is not the key; taste is the deciding factor.
The wontons are at the bottom and the foamy topping has a dan dan noodle flavor, quite ingenious.
The Chuck Eye Roll, which is part of the shoulder blade area, has more tendons and is larger than a typical steak.

The rice grains in the stewed rice are soft and have a rich milk flavor, with a distinct texture of flying fish roe. The sea urchin stewed rice has a strong milk flavor which slightly overpowers the taste of the sea urchin.
The pork ribs have a slightly chewy texture due to the skin, allowing you to enjoy four flavors: sheep skin, sheep fat, lamb meat, and sheep bone all at once.
The three capybara brothers are incredibly cute.
The service there is terrible.
Only the pesto risotto was acceptable.
Strongly recommend the dry noodles with soybean paste sauce. However, the operating hours could be extended until dinner time so that we can enjoy it one more time.
The food is cute and delicious, children eat it and give a thumbs up.
I came twice and finally got a chance, both 450 and 300 were sold out, but the corner meat was also delicious, I recommend it to friends who come to play in Hsinchu, it's worth trying.

Give one star because the grilled oysters smell very fishy and are both very small and very heavy. The grilled mushrooms are delicious. Sorry, but selling unsalable items to customers can only result in a one-star rating.
Tasty, diverse products, it's the flavor we like, there are also many choices for drinks, this restaurant is on our list!
Try the fried shrimp balls with sauce, they are also very crispy, and the shrimp meat is very firm. The taste relies on the mayonnaise sauce, but it's still okay.

Hello, thank you for your recommendation. The sashimi rice bowl really has a generous portion and guests like it very much. The young lady working inside is the owner's daughter. She helps out at the store during holidays and after school. Thank you also for your encouragement.

Very tasty and distinctive pasta, suitable for those who prefer pasta with more texture. The distinctive Japanese sauce is very delicious, with a rich and delicate flavor. Paired with wide noodles, each bite is full of texture and aroma, making it very satisfying.
The takeout shop owner said he has been running it for half a year, and initially said it's neither popular nor controversial.
The burger is delicious~ The fries are crispy and healthier when baked... The highlight is that the owner is really relaxed...
Fantastic milk mochi tofu pudding ice.
I quite like fish ball salad, it has a very Taiwanese style. The hand-rolled rice was just okay, nothing particularly impressive.
Moreover, given the recent serious food safety issues and everyone's concern about it, the dining area can be said to be very clean and tidy.
It's very uncomfortable to eat spaghetti with chopsticks.
The Thai spicy chicken is quite tasty, but the preparation makes it feel more like chicken cutlet.
This meal, according to my partner, is 'the first time in a long while that I've had such a relaxed and pleasant dining experience where every bite was so satisfying!'
The tofu pudding is delicious, and the environment is also very clean.
Although the amount of beef is not too little, and the braised beef tastes good with its seasoning and texture, I still feel somewhat unsatisfied if I were to order it alone.

The business is very good and takeaway also requires queuing. While waiting in line, you need to decide on the flavors and items you want to buy beforehand, otherwise the staff will put a lot of pressure on you. It's not to the point of being impatient, but it's quite rushed, as if they just want to finish quickly and move on to the next customer.

After opening several chain stores, I wonder how the reviews compare to before. Ten寿司 is too expensive for me to try right now...7. Special requests: Although I know that counter dining at this price point is on the lower side, my partner and I have an unspoken agreement to spend around 2000 per person for our anniversary celebration. Could you please recommend some options? Thank you!
This location is truly unique and enviable, I couldn't help but take picture after picture, experiencing a strange mix of leisure and pressure.

The takeout scallops are still fresh and delicious, the rice stew is very soft and flavorful. The restaurant has few seats, remember to make a reservation. The decor features many potted plants and is comfortable.
Now for the restaurant's meal set A soup, it's a thick soup with added croutons, minced meat, onions and other bits, the flavor is rich.

The store's environment is small and exquisite. I was lucky enough to be the first person to register for dinner time, so I didn't have to wait. I also happened to meet the owner at the door who patiently explained the process to me. Otherwise, many first-time customers would likely be confused about the reservation, ordering (self-service kiosks), and dining procedures.
The oiliness and saltiness of the goose fat rice at this place is much stronger than that of Ah Kuo's Good Taste, and it also has added red shallots.

A chef resembled the Naples mafia character from the TV show 'The White Chef and The Black Chef' (?), but had a good service attitude. That day there were many people dining, yet he still patiently explained things to us and helped arrange our seating.
The food can tell that it was cooked with care! The attitude is also very good.

Signature chili noodle soup costs 140 yuan, mushroom and tender beef mixed noodles cost 150 yuan, originally there were thin and thick noodles to choose from, but that day only thin noodles were available, with decent chewiness.
The creamy filling with moisturizing and non-greasy fragrance is very pleasant to eat.
Hiroshima oyster fry, recommended by Christine's sister, super juicy and full of the sea flavor, this dish is really good but a bit pricey.

For the cake, I came here by reputation, the cake is a bit pricey! But the texture is soft and fluffy, and the ingredients are fresh! Eating it makes me very happy. One piece costs over 200 and requires a minimum purchase of one drink, next time I'll decide to take it away!

Today we ordered four dishes together with my family, and the waiting time was really long. After registering for a table, we waited for a while, and after being seated, we waited for an hour for our food to arrive. It was really too long. Fortunately, we weren't waiting outside, otherwise we would have been roasted by the heat. Also, it's very difficult to find parking.
If you want to eat grilled chicken, it's still a safe choice.
Spicy pollock roe shrimp noodles are delicious. Remember to mix the broth at the bottom with the noodles before eating.
Shocked, I only found out after reading reviews that the shop often forgets to put ingredients, no taro balls in two servings of tofu pudding, and it's so expensive, tricked by the Instagram ad.
The overall taste of the soup with scallops and spicy mayonnaise is strong, especially suitable for those who prefer heavy flavors.
The fried chicken as the main dish with all-you-can-eat rice, soup, and drinks is very fragrant and delicious, making it very satisfying.
So this restaurant insists that delicious presentation should not sacrifice health.
The highlight of this area is the grill section, which offers roasted beef steaks, pork ribs, and it's also the biggest attraction of Usij.

The seating inside was less than expected, but the environment was very clean and tidy. The staff were all very friendly. I really liked the option of having milk jelly. Strongly recommend the sesame mini tangyuan.
The environment is clean and elegant, and the 3Q tofu pudding with ice sand is really delicious.

Now there's still a large bowl of beef noodles for only 85 with an egg for 15, you can get full for just 100. The beef noodles are really recommended. The downside is that it's really hard to park nearby.

The two main dishes cannot be distinguished visually, and the taste difference is only in the flavor of Shaoxing wine, which is quite salty and goes well with rice. It's a bit of a pity that no invoice is issued given the current business model.

The tofu pudding is very delicious! The children in the class especially like the fresh milk jelly series. In summer, adding black sugar shaved ice is super delicious! In winter, there are also tasty sweet soups available for purchase. I recommend everyone to buy from this place.
Eating all the way, the saltiness and aroma of Hakka cuisine were not prominent, and the braised pork was extremely greasy, making me put down my chopsticks in surrender.

I want to eat angelica duck noodle soup because it's cold outside. Nanmen Angelica Duck is a good choice. The most important thing is that the angelica soup base has a pure and fragrant taste, warming your heart and stomach with just one sip. The angelica soup goes well with vermicelli noodles, which have a satisfying texture. It's highly praised by locals in Hsinchu.
▲Oat milk tea $120 My favorite part of this drink is the layer of milk foam on top, which is really rich. It pairs perfectly with the oat milk tea.
There are many food options, you can order according to your preferences.
I ordered the dish with a mild spice level, so the soup base was slightly clear.
FeedBurger2.0 really impresses with its food experience! The onion rings are crispy and delicious, and the burger patty is juicy and tasty, making it a place you'll want to return to.
The dining environment of the courtyard is very good, and the food is also delicious.
I went to buy it right after the store opened today, and every bowl of tofu pudding tasted sour.

The environment of the May Day Happy Restaurant is spacious inside, able to accommodate many guests. Whether it's the design of the tables and chairs or all the decorations, everything feels very high-quality.

Lunch~Unfortunately, there were quite a few people dining, so the serving speed was not quick! We waited for a short while, which wasn't very considerate for those who still need to work in the afternoon.
The male staff member had a bad attitude, was careless with his work, and even swore. Even though the food was delicious, I wouldn't want to come back.
A warm dinner soup with a strong angelica root flavor.
Price evaluation, the boss is very friendly.
The taro balls are very chewy but the taste is not enough, Qingyuan's is really better. This place has five-star reviews for sending items.
The mochi is fresh, but not particularly impressive, just cheap and tasty.
Here we talk about the pie crust separately. Since it is a lattice pie crust, the texture is more solid and chewy.
The thickness is just right, the texture is soft yet chewy, and the food tastes very delicious.
Additionally, the staff's service attitude does not match the quality of the store's decor. The entire store feels very commercial, with high prices and a focus on increasing customer traffic.
The capybara triplets are super cute and adorable...
The store manager is very nice and the service is good.

Walking into this small wine bar, his position was really great. The tense atmosphere of the entire restaurant, despite only having an hour to stay, made me choose to step into the restaurant for a simple drink.

Environment introduction: This time we visited the pork tamago onigiri restaurant in Ameriville. The yellow sign is very cute. There aren't many indoor seating options, and you often need to wait in line to order. It's recommended that you queue up first while waiting for an indoor seat.
The asparagus is quite juicy, among the five types of vegetables, I like the asparagus and the baby onions a bit more.

Yi Pao youtiao chicken dried rice noodles, drizzled with a glossy sauce, the chicken legs are quite appealing. Underneath the chicken are rice noodles, youtiao, cucumber,不得不说鸡肉真的很好吃，肉质软嫩好吃，配上油葱相当适合，河粉口感Q软，吸满酱汁不死咸。

I've gone there twice from Zhunan to eat. Apart from the rush hour when people get on and off the bus, there are no other drawbacks. There are many choices of hamburger flavors, which I recommend for those who like hamburgers. It's very American.

Entering the store, one will find that the dining space inside is quite spacious, with sofas and comfortable seats. In addition to regular seating areas, there are also private rooms, catering to different groups of customers.

However, due to the restaurant's location being relatively far from the nearest subway station and the lack of prominent commercial areas nearby, its fame is still not as high as that of 'Yun Ding Er Hot Pot Restaurant' in Shipai and 'Si Ye Hot Pot Restaurant' in Zhishan.
There are not many seating positions inside the chain tofu pudding shop.
Professional chef's exclusive seasoning and fresh ingredients have made me visit this restaurant with various friends for several consecutive months. I strongly recommend it.
The staff are friendly and provide good service, with generous portions and high value for money.
Medium spiciness is spicy preserved radish + secret recipe chili sauce, quite flavorful.

There's free seaweed miso soup to drink! The lamb skewers, bitter melon, fish cakes, and scallion enoki mushroom meat skewers are delicious, especially when paired with pepper powder. The grilled fish is fresh and sweet, while the tofu skin/tofu sheets are just okay.
I love Yitang! I've eaten there many times and the attitude is great, the food is also delicious~.
Hot iron pot dish, rich broth is very satisfying with rice.

Last time I came here, I thought the food was very delicious. This time, on my second visit, the staff竟然said "We cannot dine-in now." But they didn't give any reason. Moreover, there were other customers dining inside. Is it going to be up to the staff's mood whether we can dine-in in the future? There are no clear standards at all. The experience was terrible.
We ordered clams in white sauce and chicken in green sauce. The portions were generous and the ingredients were fresh. The sauces were rich and the hand-made noodles were very chewy.

Today, I ordered 10 servings of grass jelly from UMC for delivery, with free toppings of taro balls and rice cakes. However, there were no taro balls or rice cakes inside, and the red beans were given in such small quantities. It's ridiculous that they charge this price.
The restaurant is very suitable for friends to gather and have a drink! The ingredients are very fresh and delicious.

The food was very satisfying and I would recommend this burger place. PS: The service attitude is super good, if you don't know what to order, you can ask the owner who will introduce everything to you one by one.
The abalone is satisfactory, the chicken soup base is made with pig's stomach, and the chicken meat bun contains Job's tears.
The pork is too greasy, and the side dishes could be lighter. It feels like a lunch box meal.
The burger is huge, the fried foods are delicious, the prices are very reasonable, the bosses are great to chat with, and the service attitude is excellent.

The food is average (the portions are sufficient) but the dining space is small, there's a long wait for seating, and the place has a strong smell of油烟. Additionally, the tableware inside the restaurant is extremely greasy, leaving oil stains on your hands and an unpleasant odor... it's quite uncomfortable... .
It can be booked through Pocketconcierge, with three booking slots available every day. The restaurant is definitely worth a visit.
From when I lived in Hsinchu city to now! I still prefer to go out of my way from Zhubei to eat at the old shop, the soup tastes exactly the same and it's really delicious.
The dish didn't really taste like the skinless chili sauce, and the beef was just cooked properly without any particularly impressive flavor or texture.
The restaurant offers miso soup for dine-in and it's a good choice if you want to eat until you're full. However, the food is quite ordinary, not particularly delicious but also not bad.
But there are peppers, and I personally don't like them.
The meat was too tough and didn't taste good when I went there before. Maybe it wasn't cooked long enough. I haven't gone back since.
The burger is super delicious! The fried foods are flavorful enough without any sauce, and the cheese sticks really have that stringy pull.

Pesto Clam Risotto: The dish might be quite salty due to a lot of cheese powder and clams, but the pesto is delicious!! Luxury Meat Sauce Spaghetti: The red sauce is very tasty!!! Not as salty as the pesto one, the pasta doesn't resemble Italian spaghetti much, it's more like the wide noodles in beef noodle soup.
The cat is cute, the food is delicious, but there's too little noodles and too many ice cubes.
号称新竹最好吃的炒饭实际吃起来觉得还行，绍兴比鱼卵好吃饭炒得不够干不过每个人的口味不同蛤蜊汤倒是挺出色的然后真的要等很久建议先打电话。
And the rice was impressive; it wasn't plain white rice but truffle mushroom rice, very fragrant with great taste and texture.
The cheese snowflake beef hotpot (mild spicy) and milk pot are popular series at 'Chu Jiu Hot Pot Restaurant', and I really enjoy the taste.

The store environment is good, but the dining area is a bit cramped. The restaurant provides room temperature lemon water instead of iced, which is a bit of a pity. As for the food, I ordered squid-flavored clams and cuttlefish vermicelli today. Compared to regular spaghetti, the pasta has a stronger flour taste and is quite chewy.
I highly recommend 「人类都是面类」!
This is the part that more people online say tastes good, which is the small portion of seafood egg yolk shrimp and shellfish rice bowl, the rice is slightly sticky.
The cutlery is placed in the middle drawer of the beverage counter, and if someone happens to be filling drinks, it's hard to notice.
A service that is good and clean, with fast food delivery, and a store that provides sanitary pads in the restroom, which is very thoughtful.
The skewers are delicious, the service is friendly, the atmosphere is lively, suitable for gatherings, but the seating is slightly crowded.
Fried with oil, garlic and white wine, it tastes good and has a bouncy texture, but the clams are not sweet enough or plump enough.

The ice cream was pretty good, but the drink was rather ordinary. The fruit, wax gourd, was pretty good, and the dessert was just okay. The main course included steak and pork chop, served with sweet potato fries and some bean sprouts.
The food is fresh and delicious, the restaurant is worth visiting.
His pasta actually resembles ramen more closely; the noodles are very chewy. The sauce is prepared with Italian seasoning, and overall, the dish is slightly wet but also quite refreshing.

The beef spaghetti takeaway only had some leftover beef chunks from hotpot and an egg. It was extremely expensive and tasted like plastic. This is the worst and most overpriced beef noodle soup I've ever had. I won't be returning and don't recommend it.
The price is reasonable, the food is delicious, found a new spot.
The soup has plenty of ingredients and the chicken wings are delicious!
Actually, the wagyu rice bowl we ate did not have the meat portion upgraded, which might be why it looks like there's less beef.
A variety of delicious burger flavors, the beef meatballs are tasty and can be ordered.

A special pasta dish, the noodles resemble ramen, feeling like a blend of Japanese and Italian styles, ordered cream G meat, Roman green sauce, and steamed clams, delicious especially the green sauce is very rich.
The green curry chicken is delicious! It's not too spicy.

The noodles of the pasta are chewy and delicious. The dishes are freshly made so you need to wait a bit. The shrimp is very fresh. However, I couldn't find any forks as I am not used to eating with chopsticks (personal preference).
The portion sizes are adequate, and the flavors are good.
The after-sales service was very sincere after being given the wrong item before.
The pudding is delicious with a light tea flavor and sufficient quantity.
Finally, after it was our turn, I felt that the ventilation in the basement wasn't very good. The vegetables in the soup curry had been fried, but the restaurant overall had a stronger smell of oil.
Additionally, you can ask the service staff to add spiciness (the stir-fried spicy version is delicious).
Although it is not bad, compared to egg fried rice from other restaurants, the aroma is much less impressive, which is quite a pity.

I had seen Japanese thick-cut pork cutlet before and couldn't find anywhere that sold such exaggeratedly thick ones. Then I saw it on Douyin and realized this was what I had been looking for. Due to work, I never had time to go, but today I happened to be free and specially made a trip from Changhua to Xinzhu to pay my respects.
"Chu Jiu Hot Pot Restaurant"'s white rice has just the right hardness and moisture content, not overly sticky, it's really delicious.
We ordered spicy mayonnaise chicken and squid clams, originally expecting the sauce to be fresh and sweet, but they didn't have much flavor.
The seasoning is just right, not too salty, and it goes well with cold drinks.

Previously, I always ate sashimi with wasabi and soy sauce, but the eating method suggested by Tsuji Hamono with sesame nut sauce turned out to be surprisingly good. There were four pieces of sashimi in total. According to Tsuji Hamono's recommended way, you can eat two pieces first and save the rest for later consumption with Japanese sea bream broth.
The sea urchin sauce chicken wide noodles are delicious, the chicken is very tender, but the sea urchin sauce is not quite what I expected (?).

Wonton dumplings, meatballs, and egg flower soup, the "wonton dumplings, meatballs, and egg flower soup" with rich ingredients is a soup that I really like, the egg flowers have a smooth and tender texture, and the cooking time is just right; the meatballs are softer with a slight chewiness, and they taste quite good.

Handmade savory pie/$190 After finishing the sweet ones, I feel like having something savory. This could be a good choice. The egg flavor is very strong, and there's lettuce and shredded radish on the side to cut through the richness.
I visited many affordable Thai restaurants in Hsinchu and based on the restaurant environment, the deliciousness of the food, and the price, Taimeow is currently my top choice.
The overall restaurant decor and the outside little garden are both very beautiful, so people who want to take photos should come and take them.
The staff were very friendly and cute. This time I ordered taro red bean peanut milk jelly (base - grass jelly ice blend) + half portion of milk mochi.

I feel that the crispy skin of the fried chicken is a bit hard for someone with poor teeth, but the inner chicken meat is very tender. The side dishes of fries and chicken nuggets are just average. The only advantage is that the fries are not too salty and the chicken nuggets come with a special sauce.
The condiment station has chili peppers and spicy oil. The former is oilier with a bit of spiciness, while the latter is spicy with a hint of fragrance.
Considering the price, there's nothing much to complain about the portion or side dishes, and I would visit again.

In terms of the pasta, this time I chose thin noodles. Thin noodles are better at holding sauce and the fresh noodles have a texture similar to ramen, so it doesn't feel like eating Italian pasta at all. The portion size is also generous, so guys don't need to worry about being hungry.
A thick-cut pork chop shop hidden in the market, the food is quite tasty, I would come back if given the chance.
The basic tofu skin and sweet non-spicy bean curd have no taste and are not good. Not recommended.
The thick-cut pork loin was very tender and delicious. The service was excellent.
The rice jelly is delicious, and the tofu pudding is also delicious.

Affordable Thai cuisine, the red curry chicken with a mild spiciness was appetizing. The Thai milk cubes were delicious. My friend ordered a milk tea but I didn't try it so I can't comment on it. The staff service was good. Also, the cats were cute (I've uploaded a blurry photo of a cat XD.)
There are many seasoning options, such as yuzu salt, truffle sauce, scallion salt, etc.
Good quality but parking is difficult.

The Italian food served by Japanese owners tastes very good~ The price is mid-high range. Friends who like pasta should give it a try (the downside is that there's a strong smell of cooking oil). This might be due to the open kitchen layout.
Requires queuing at the site, food is delicious, have eaten there multiple times.
The 'Salted Peanuts' have a subtle nutty aroma, with added peanuts enhancing the texture.
Douhua and xiancao are both super delicious, adding fresh milk makes it even better, every time I eat ice cream I come here, highly recommend.

Also, it indicates the calorie count, which is very thoughtful XD Just now, this bowl had a total of 338 calories, and the protein content was higher than I expected! It must be because of the mung beans.
Lion's head belongs to the braised, heavy-flavored category and must be eaten with rice.
The food is delicious, and you can watch baseball at the restaurant, which is great.

Compared to other hot pot all-you-can-eat restaurants, I really like their table layout. The distance between each table is quite wide, and the tabletop space is large. Additionally, there weren't many people dining that day, probably only about six tables.

【Mixed Soup 3】The mixed soup contains three pieces of fish balls, two fish meatballs, and one dried tofu ball. The fish balls have a slight fishy taste which Asu cannot accept. The texture of the fish meatballs is rather soft, and the dried tofu ball lacks chewiness. The soup itself is just average. 【Blanched Greens 3】.
Today I ordered some grass jelly with lots of toppings and it was really great.
Business is good, the boss lady is kind.

This dish is quite unique, with a layer of SpongeBob SquarePants jelly on top and a mixture of crab meat and cold tomato soup inside. The mixture has a strong ginger flavor, making it hard to taste the eggplant.
The portion size is quite large for the price, so I would consider coming back.
The chicken wings were cooked perfectly and were very juicy. I ordered some grilled octopus and was worried it might not be fresh, but it turned out to be quite fresh and very chewy.
Spicy and fragrant large intestine and stinky tofu hot pot (mildly spicy), the signature spicy series is a must-order item when visiting 'Chujiu Spicy Canteen' for the first time.
A very cute dessert, come and eat!
The poached egg with cheese sauce is smooth and creamy, very milky.
The texture of the rice vermicelli is somewhat like rice noodles with less elasticity, and I quite like it.
The food is incredibly delicious. The boss is straightforward and generous. Every flavor is so good.

The only thing that needs special attention for the store is to have staff wear masks and gloves. Safety first. I saw someone's hands completely without gloves, reaching into the container to scoop tofu pudding, and they weren't even wearing a mask...
From the old market days to now, this noodle shop that I've been eating at since I was little, the beef noodles are really delicious... .
The milk jelly is great, the boss is friendly, awesome.
Crab is a classic ingredient in Thai cuisine. We ordered the red crab vermicelli pot here, and the vermicelli absorbed the crab's精华, making every bite of vermicelli filled with rich crab aroma.
The food is delicious, but the order is always wrong.
The coconut meat sauce, curry soup sauce, and spicy sauce are all very good.
The fresh milk mochi is very tasty, and its cute shape is loved by children.
It takes a while when there are many people.
If not for the simple environment and slightly闷热 atmosphere, it would be a good place to enjoy a hot pot meal.
The set meal price increase - condensed milk Earl Grey tea, very aromatic British Earl Grey tea, the condensed milk given is also generous, extremely thick and sweet.
Another recommended item is honey taro. The large pieces of honey taro are soft and fluffy, and they are not overly sweet.
Flower branch sushi, slightly sticky and not crispy.

I remembered to take photos only halfway through eating. Thank you for the original flavor tofu pudding, with ingredients: pearls, sago, sweet potato balls, and taro balls. The ingredients were very chewy. I chose the black sugar ice blend as the broth, which wasn't too sweet and was quite tasty. There were other options for the broth such as grass jelly ice blend, black sugar water, unsweetened soy milk, and fresh milk. The shop looked bright and clean, and I would definitely come back.
It's a pity that the few minutes on stage cannot fully present the value behind the food.
Recently, a hot topic on Xingxin Road is a restaurant serving fresh noodles.
"Moj" $380 gin itself has a fresh citrus aroma and floral fruit fragrance, paired with rich honey sweetness and dried jasmine flowers, it is very fragrant and sweet.
The sauce is of a thinner consistency, but it still adheres well to the noodles, and the aroma remains strong, with grated cheese sprinkled on top.
It may not be authentic Thai flavor, but it's still quite to my taste, and it comes with some vegetables which is good.
And the environment is stunning! It's completely a photo spot for influencers! (Although the restaurant name is very retro) Clean and easy to read with no ads.
The food was satisfactory, and the dining environment was very comfortable, with clean and thoughtful restrooms, and even cute cats.

The pork chop itself is tender (slow-cooked texture) but overcooked (dry and lacking juice). The accompanying sauce is quite good. Considering the queuing time and price, this is not a great choice. If there was no need to queue, the rating could be bumped up to four stars.
Eating in gives the impression that the staff are not in a good mood. The smoothies, tofu pudding, and toppings... are just average.

The location has limited seating, so there's usually a wait for indoor dining. However, the sauces, whether green, white, meat, or the spicy cod roe series, are all rich and flavorful. The chicken used is breast meat, but it's tender without being tough.
The wide noodles have a pretty good texture, but the pesto sauce is just average overall. I feel like other special flavors should be better.
Each table is equipped with water bottles and glasses for diners to use at their convenience, making the service very considerate.

The chicken is sous-vide, it's very soft and tender, this was a surprise, didn't expect the sushi restaurant to serve such soft chicken XD The pork belly is also good, aromatic and rich in flavor, although it's a bit tough, but the taste is still okay.

Chef Xiao, I arranged time to teach everyone how to make it and you'll know how long it takes. The fish is extremely fresh and juicy, tender without any earthy taste. The owner uses farmed snapper, and such a dish can actually be sold for 450-500 at a restaurant or hot pot place.
The environment is clean and comfortable, the food is delicious, the dishes come quickly, there are many types of beer, the boss and boss lady are super friendly, highly recommend this restaurant!
Overall, I prefer the pig offal, but I couldn't really appreciate the rice noodle soup, and the fried tofu was not particularly impressive.
The seat was a bit small, but everything else was fine.

The shredded cabbage part is acceptable, but compared to Japanese and other restaurant versions, it's a bit less crispy and sweet. Please consider your personal taste before ordering. Cash——2024.05——.
The tamagoyaki has a soft and delicate texture, but the taste is rather light. The eel inside doesn't have much flavor either, and it's not warm enough. It didn't leave a strong impression on me.
The sofa area on the left side of the entrance is a great place for friends to gather and have a few drinks.

Grandpa's braised pork rice, the minced pork at 'Chu Jiu Spicy Restaurant' is slightly fatty, and the braising sauce is quite thick, but it doesn't feel greasy. The overall aroma is sufficient, and the taste is good. It pairs well with the pot dishes.
I was immediately captivated by the cute decorations at the entrance, and the overall environment is very clean. Even sitting at the bar does not feel crowded.
Although the staff was friendly in handling it later, it still counts as a small flaw in service.
Ordered capybara, it looks good and tastes delicious.
Black sugar iced smoothie with tofu pudding, very refreshing and delicious.
The food is delicious and authentic, made with real ingredients! The owner's 50 years of experience is invaluable...
The texture of the rice is just right and it was cooked very well.
This is also great, the pufferfish liver adds a touch of sweetness and richness.
